situation_summary: Account had been live for 8 months but never properly onboarded — the original champion rushed the setup and skipped training sessions. Only 2 of 7 modules in use. New team members had no training and were creating workarounds. Platform seen as 'too complex'.
risk_signals: 3 team members using personal spreadsheets instead of platform
original champion Suresh demoted — no longer platform owner
no training records for 4 of 7 current users
renewal decision pending review from COO
action_taken: Complete re-onboarding programme — 4 sessions over 3 weeks. Simplified onboarding path mapped to PharmEasy's specific supply chain workflows. COO briefing with before/after adoption metrics. Dedicated Slack channel for 60-day post-onboarding support.
outcome: Renewed. Feature adoption jumped from 28% to 71% within 6 weeks of re-onboarding. COO approved renewal same day as briefing.
csm_notes: The problem was never the product — it was the rushed original onboarding. Re-onboarding properly with workflow-specific training changed everything. The COO briefing was key: showing quantified adoption progress before-and-after made the decision easy.
